devdoc.details: World ID, attempts, windows, commit-reveal, block/resurrect are added in subsequent iterations.

checkin(bytes32).details: In later versions this requires a World ID proof.

createProfile(address,uint32).details: In later versions, owner must provide a World ID proof here.

devdoc.title: PulseOracle v0.1 - Core accumulator

checkin(bytes32).notice: Owner checks in, resetting accumulated weight.

computeProfileId(address,address).notice: Compute profileId from owner and consumer addresses

createProfile(address,uint32).notice: Create a profile. msg.sender is the consumer. owner is the user being monitored.

finalize(bytes32).notice: Finalize a profile that has reached threshold (no challenge period in v0.1)

getAdapters(bytes32).notice: Get the list of adapter addresses for a profile

reportSignal(bytes32,uint8,bytes32).notice: Report a signal for a profile. Called by authorized adapters.

userdoc.notice: Minimal version: profile creation, adapter authorization, signal reporting, threshold detection.
